event.title: Phat La's Graduation Ceremony
event.location: 59c Nguyen Dinh Chieu Street, District 3, HCMC
event.description: Phát mời bạn đến dự lễ tốt nghiệp đại học.

stamps.title: Make it Fire
stamps.description: Just like the fire at 'HOI TRAI BIT', may our future burn brighter than ever. Let's keep that flame alive, brothers.

stamps.title: 4 TL  1 Trip
stamps.description: Bao Loc - Da Lat with these 4 idiots. 3 days of pure spontaneity and young blood. What a ride!

stamps.title: Random Pic with Be
stamps.description: Wearing my Be cap in the restroom right after a presentation for that tough old professor.

stamps.title: Bois kill all deadline
stamps.description: The squad that crushed every major project at UEH and BIT. Wishing all 6 of us the life we've always dreamed of. Love you, bros!

stamps.title: Ben Tre Moon Festival
stamps.description: "Vui Hoi Trang Ram 2025" Wrapping up my last volunteering journey in Ben Tre before graduation. Grateful for every moment. Love you all!

stamps.title: We build aspiration
stamps.description: Same mindset, same hustle. It's scary how much we're alike. We've got big goals and even bigger hearts. Much love, bro. Let's keep grinding toward the dream.

event.title: Le Facteur's Graduation Ceremony
event.location: 59c Nguyen Dinh Chieu Street, District 3, HCMC
event.description: Le Facteur mời bạn đến dự lễ tốt nghiệp đại học.

stamps.title: Post Office indacorner
stamps.description: The passion and dedication started way back in high school. We've been through hella ups and downs, plenty of setbacks, but somehow the core squad is still standing strong to this day. Shout out to the brothers, and may y'all keep your swords sharp in your own battles.

stamps.title: Tang Thuong 601
stamps.description: Those first shaky days in a strange place, at a brand new school. The first rented room of my life — where dreams started cooking up and where those first stumbles were taken care of. Grateful for all the firsts… the ones that are still here today, and even the ones that ended the very first time.

stamps.title: Young Boys EEC01
stamps.description: Really lucky to find people on the same wavelength in the middle of a sea of strangers. From just some kids back then to grown men now, making decisions that shape our own lives. Peace out!

stamps.title:
Dalat
immersive
stamps.description: A little reward after those long days grinding on campus. I'm really just immersing myself in the vibe of this place. This is my second time in Dalat, but only now do I get the chance to slow down and actually take in every moment here. Maybe Dalat isn't quite the same as it used to be, but the vibe of this place will probably always have a spot in the hearts of anyone who's ever been here. And thank you too, babe

stamps.title: Phan Thiet 8386
stamps.description: The first out-of-town trip for the 8386 crew. Another memory in the books. Might be a long while before we get another trip like this again… probably after one or two of the boys come back from the army. Haha.

stamps.title:
Long Way
Riding
stamps.description: Getting to know you was the first time I stepped out of my comfort zone — riding my motorbike over 160 km back and forth. It was the first time I discovered how beautiful the world can be when I explore it myself. It was also the first time I realized I had been stuck for too long because of my own stubbornness and outdated mindset. And you were the first person who saw that and helped me break free from it. Merci beaucoup!

event.title: Hoang Kaa's Graduation Ceremony
event.location: 59c Nguyen Dinh Chieu Street, District 3, HCMC
event.description: Hoàng Kaa mời bạn đến dự lễ tốt nghiệp đại học.

stamps.title:
New
bachelor
stamps.description: After all the days of studying and growing, this three-year journey has finally reached a new milestone. The diploma in my hands is not just a result. It's proof of the whole journey I've been through.

stamps.title: EEC01
stamps.description: University life was not only about lectures and classes. It was also about activities and events we joined together. These group photos keep the laughter of our university days. Everyone in these photos is a part of my memories.

stamps.title:
Vui Hoi
Trang Ram
stamps.description: Some evenings during the volunteer trip were very special. We sat together, talked, and shared many laughs. People who were once strangers slowly became friends. New relationships often start from simple moments like these. "Trieu hat mua roi, khong hat nao roi nham cho. Nhung nguoi chung ta gap khong ai la ngau nhien."

stamps.title:
The
Boys
stamps.description: The people who went through university life with me. We studied together, worked hard together, and grew together. They are not only friends, but also teammates who shared this journey with me.

stamps.title:
My First
Friends
stamps.description: The friends I met during the first days of university. Over time, we became an important part of each other's lives. We shared stories, laughter, and sometimes small arguments. I hope we will continue to stay connected in the future.

stamps.title:
The Last
Volunteer Trip
stamps.description: My last volunteer trip during university. Still the same K48 friends who joined me on many trips before. Whenever I asked, they were always ready to go. A beautiful memory to close this chapter of my youth.

event.title: Huu Khai's Graduation Ceremony
event.location: 59c Nguyen Dinh Chieu Street, District 3, HCMC
event.description: Hữu Khải mời bạn đến dự lễ tốt nghiệp đại học.

stamps.title: My Belonging Love
stamps.description: Some of the most meaningful things in life appear when we least expect them. Through my university journey, I was fortunate enough to meet someone who would become my lifelong companion - my beloved girlfriend. Every step together has shown me just how much she means to me. Through laughter, challenges, and countless memories, I’ve come to realize that she is not just part of my story, but a place where I truly belong. My hope is that we continue walking side by side for many years to come.

stamps.title:
Field
Trip
stamps.description: Every great achievement begins with small steps of learning. During our field trips with the 8386 Crews, we gathered bits of knowledge from real-world experiences through observing, questioning, and discovering together. Those lessons, though sometimes simple at first glance, became the foundation of something far greater. By combining our efforts, ideas, and determination, we were able to turn those small pieces into an accomplishment that truly amazed us all.

stamps.title: Last Day at University
stamps.description: Life is a journey filled with ups and downs, but what makes it meaningful are the memories we create along the way. As our final day at university arrived, we realized how much we had experienced together: late nights, shared struggles, laughter, and moments that shaped who we are today. Through all those experiences, we didn’t just earn a degree; we built friendships and bonds that will last far beyond the campus. Looking back, what we truly created was not just memories, but a heck of a good time and relationships that we will carry with us for the rest of our lives.

stamps.title:
GD
QP
stamps.description: The military study days were chaotic, exhausting yet unbelievably energetic just like the spirit of freshmen stepping into university life. For two weeks at the military training center, we lived, ate, sang, and laughed together under a completely different routine. The early mornings, the strict discipline, and the endless moments of fun created an experience none of us will ever forget. Somewhere between the drills and the laughter, those two weeks quietly shaped us: teaching us discipline, resilience, and the value of standing together as one.

stamps.title:
Growing
Up
stamps.description: Growing up and pursuing a career can be challenging, but it is also a truly rewarding journey. The very first opportunities I received from my teachers gave me the chance to step into the real world, learn, and gain valuable experience. Through those early encounters, I gradually discovered the path I wanted to follow and the values I wished to pursue. Those moments became the foundation for my first steps into the professional world, where every experience serves as a new lesson on the road to maturity.

stamps.title:
University
bros
stamps.description: College life would never have been the same without the friends who filled it with unforgettable moments. From random late-night talks to spontaneous adventures, these are the people who turned ordinary days into memories worth keeping forever. Even as life slowly pulls us toward different paths, I know the laughter and stories we shared will always remain a special part of my journey. Some friendships may grow quieter with time, but the memories will never fade.

event.title: Quoc Bao's Graduation Ceremony
event.location: 59c Nguyen Dinh Chieu Street, District 3, HCMC
event.description: Quốc Bảo mời bạn đến dự lễ tốt nghiệp đại học.

stamps.title: First Camping Trip
stamps.description: Beyond the glow of the flickering campfire, you'll find a group of freshmen—a bit green, a little naive, but radiating just like those golden sparks. Within them, the fire of youth burns bright, fueled by an eternal longing. And so, the story begins...

stamps.title: Sai Gon to Da Lat
stamps.description: Young hearts are always chasing distant horizons—the realms of wild freedom and boundless wandering. We've just ticked off an 800km journey from Saigon to Da Lat on our trusty bikes. From conquering winding mountain passes to nearly getting stuck in hidden waterfalls, all shared over steaming meals in the Highland's spring chill. Here's to many more miles and many more memories together...

stamps.title: Vui Hoi Trang Ram
stamps.description: Driven by a heart that loves to give, I found in Vui Hoi Trang Ram a place to share kindness and bond with like-minded friends. This journey has made my uni life so much more colorful and memorable than I ever imagined. A massive thank you to everyone…

stamps.title: Me and my Crew
stamps.description: If you want to go fast, go alone; but if you want to go far and have a blast, go together. That's us—8386 Crews. We've fought side by side through every academic battle and faced down every deadline together. From the toughest moments to the times we almost called it quits, here we are, still standing as one. Even as we start looking toward our own paths and personal goals, we'll always be on the same front line.

stamps.title: Spark of Youth
stamps.description: Strumming, singing, and music—they've always been the soul-healing medicine through my darkest days. At every Vui Hoi Trang Ram, my only wish is to let my voice soar, spreading a spark of youthful energy and passion to all the little ones. My hope for you all is to grow into wonderful citizens, living with a heart that beats for the community...

stamps.title: Me and my Bro(s)
stamps.description: This is the friend (among so many others) who has walked by my side through every peak and valley of my college years. My only hope is that Phat La and all my brothers from 8386 Crews will always keep that passionate heart burning bright. Together, we stand tall!

event.title: Vinh Nghi's Graduation Ceremony
event.location: 59c Nguyen Dinh Chieu Street, District 3, HCMC
event.description: Vinh Nghi mời bạn đến dự lễ tốt nghiệp đại học.

stamps.title:
Bootcamp
Chronicles
stamps.description: 10 days at military school: A brief but unforgettable escape from the endless cycle of deadlines. Living the life of a true soldier taught me more than just discipline—it taught me about brotherhood. Shouting out to my boys in Room B2.206, Squad 9, Company 5. The joy, the struggles, and the solidarity we shared will stay with me forever. EEC01 forever in my heart!

stamps.title: Sands, Waves & Spirits
stamps.description: Throwback to the Communist Youth Union of BIT Traditional Camp, from tackling those insane challenges to soaking up the ocean breeze and enjoying the BBQ feast—and let's not forget those 'drink-until-you-drop' nights. That youthful fire in our college student hearts was burning brighter than ever back then. What a time to be alive!

stamps.title: Rhythms of Moonlight
stamps.description: Back for round two! My second Mid-Autumn volunteer campaign was an absolute blast. Leading the stage, singing, and acting in front of hundreds of kids and locals in Ben Tre Province was a nerve-wracking yet exhilarating experience. My heart was racing, but the smiles stayed wide because we knew we were making a real milestone here. Left a piece of my heart in the land of coconuts!

stamps.title: The Toxic Tetrad
stamps.description: Meet my chaotic university circle. We're mischievous, reckless and probably a bit too crazy for most people, but they're my ride-or-die and being with them is the most comfortable feeling in the world. From handling life's messes to keeping each other's darkest secrets, I wouldn't trade this weirdness for anything!

stamps.title: Project 6: 1275 Days
stamps.description: Six brothers, 3.5 years, and a lifetime of memories. From the lecture halls to where we are now, we've grown together as a squad of six talented individuals, each excelling in our own fields. I've always been so proud of every single one of you. Though our paths and goals may diverge from here, my only wish is for all of you to find nothing but success and happiness. To the best boys I could ask for!

stamps.title: Which abyss is deepest?
stamps.description: Which abyss is deepest? Stepping out of the lecture hall and into my very first Mid-Autumn volunteer campaign! It was an unforgettable experience performing and bringing high energy to the kids with my amazing teammates. This student life is so much more meaningful when we share our youth and laughter with the community.

event.description: Kiệt Lương mời bạn đến dự lễ tốt nghiệp đại học.
